title: Mints Craft Dyes [Cobblemon]
description: A Cobblemon Data Pack/Side Mod that allows mint leaves to be crafted into dyes!
body:
# ![Mints Craft Dyes Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9906ce350f1f034903594b17133749870473705.png)
### [![Modrinth](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg&;n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mints-craft-dyes)[![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a1f08f989f139d720f80eec4152aa0c55a8d7b2.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/mints-craft-dyes)

Have you ever felt like mint leaves _(from [Cobblemon](https://cobblemon.com/en))_ _should_ craft dyes? Well...**this** is the pack for you! 

Simply throw any mint leaf into a crafting table, and craft dyes for each colour! 

# ![Crafting Recipe Red Dye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1ab758934827f693cd11a282be61553416993b7.png)

**FAQ:**
_Can I use this in my modpack?_

Yes of course! I'd love to see it be used in them. In fact this pack was made for my own.
